text.title: Claude Code & Cursor at Solo Tier Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-primary-tool
step.action: Claude Code if terminal-native; Cursor if inline-edit-first.

step.name: configure-model-routing
step.action: Set design / routine / mechanical model tags.

step.name: enforce-spec-first
step.action: Add a pre-flight spec template (problem + constraints + done-criteria).

step.name: validate-config
step.action: Run `validate-claude-code-and-cursor-at-solo-tier.py`. Run 3 sample tasks; measure context size + outcome.
